level_signals: 12+ years of experience as a Product Manager
Experience developing a multi-year vision, strategy and roadmap for large scale products
Experience leading cross-team initiatives from ideation to execution

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 12+ years of experience as a Product Manager
Deep user empathy and a high bar for user experience
Experience developing a multi-year vision, strategy and roadmap for large scale products
Experience leading cross-team initiatives from ideation to execution
Technical expertise: You've led technical products and/or have a background in computer science (or similar)
Strong written and verbal communication skills

scope.surface: Support Experience platform — Stripe's user-facing AI agent, conversational infrastructure across merchant dashboard, consumer apps, and third-party agent integrations
scope.business_model: B2B and B2C financial infrastructure platform
primary_metrics_inferred: AI agent resolution rate vs. human agents
Product team adoption of conversational platform
Feedback loop velocity (conversations to evals/prompt improvements)
core_responsibilities: Create the home for product teams to safely build out, understand and improve their conversational experiences.
Build feedback loops from conversations through improvement recommendations to generating evals and prompts.
Make Stripe's conversational AI agent as capable and effective as our best human agents by identifying scaled ways to improve its capabilities across surfaces, user segments and products.
Integrate human and AI conversations in the platform so that teams can understand and manage both.

Develop the infrastructure that enables internal and external AI experiences to be driven from the same foundational primitives - so that teams can build once and have that capability available to internal, external and 3rd party use cases.
Partner with GTM on expanding assistive capabilities to Stripe's GTM layer.
Partner with the Conversation UX team to unlock novel capabilities for the AI agent.

green_flags: Clear product surface and ownership articulated (AI support platform, conversational infrastructure)
Role is at the forefront of applied AI with high strategic impact
Explicit note that preferred qualifications are a bonus, not a requirement, encouraging candidates to apply
Cross-functional scope signals high organizational visibility
red_flags: No location or work arrangement specified — remote eligibility and office requirements are unclear
12+ years minimum is a high bar that significantly narrows the candidate pool
No nice-to-haves listed — preferred qualifications section is empty despite being referenced in the JD

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title 'Staff' and 12+ years requirement)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not stated in JD)
ambiguities: JD references 'preferred qualifications are a bonus, not a requirement' but lists zero preferred qualifications — the nice_to_haves section is therefore empty, which is unusual.
Technical expertise requirement uses 'and/or' — it is unclear whether leading technical products alone (without a CS background) satisfies the requirement or both are needed.
No location, city, remote policy, or work authorization information is provided in the JD.
